intent: Build a web SaaS MVP with React frontend, backend API, database, tests and release gates.
acceptance_criteria: Compiler selects a web SaaS capability pack or equivalent web software pack.
Generated task packet includes frontend, backend, database and QA work_order steps.
Runner can collect at least one passing and one failing gate evidence item.
Review report marks release not ready when a required gate fails.
nexus_integration_notes: Nexus can dispatch this packet to OpenHands, Claude Code, Codex or a custom worker.
Runtime must return step status and gate evidence callbacks.
